title: Eulophia schlechteri
taxonomy: Eulophia schlechteri is a species of orchid native to tropical Africa. This epiphytic orchid belongs to the family Orchidaceae. It is further classified into the subfamily Epidendroideae and tribe Coelogyneae. Within the genus Eulophia, it is placed in the subgenus Eulophia. This classification helps in understanding its evolutionary history and relationships with other orchid species.
